User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual user within the UniApply Hub system. Can be an admin, employee, department, or student.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for identification and communication.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system.

civilId.description: The user's 12-digit Civil ID, used for uniquely identifying employees.

employeeId.description: A short employee ID, often derived from the Civil ID.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

studentId.description: If the user is a student, this links to their main student profile ID.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student whose university applications are being managed through the UniApply Hub.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

name.description: The full name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

phone.description: The phone number of the student.

internalNumber.description: An internal use number assigned to the student.

employeeId.description: Reference to the User's Civil ID for the assigned employee.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the student's profile picture.

applications.description: A list of university applications for the student.

employeeNotes.description: Notes written by the assigned employee.

adminNotes.description: Internal notes for admins and departments.

documents.description: A list of documents uploaded for the student.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the student record was created.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the student record.

lastActivityAt.description: Timestamp of the last meaningful interaction with the student profile.

targetCountries.description: List of countries the student is interested in.

missingItems.description: A list of missing documents or information required from the student.

pipelineStatus.description: The student's status in the application pipeline.

transferHistory.description: A log of when the student was transferred between employees.

unreadUpdates.description: Counter for unread messages/updates for admins.

employeeUnreadMessages.description: Counter for unread messages for the assigned employee.

newDocumentsForEmployee.description: Counter for new documents uploaded by admin for the employee.

newDocumentsForAdmin.description: Counter for new documents uploaded by employee for the admin.

newMissingItemsForEmployee.description: Counter for new missing items added by admin for the employee.

finalChoiceUniversity.description: The name of the university the student has finalized.

transferRequested.description: Flag indicating if a transfer has been requested for this student.

deletionRequested.description: Information about a pending, approved, or rejected deletion request.

isNewForEmployee.description: Flag indicating if this student is newly assigned to an employee.

term.description: The academic term the student is applying for (e.g., 'Fall 2024').

studentLogins.description: A list of login accounts associated with this student.

changeAgentRequired.description: Flag indicating if this student requires an urgent agent change or high-priority oversight.

NotificationTemplate.title: Notification Template
NotificationTemplate.description: Configuration for automated WhatsApp messages via specific WANotifier webhook URLs.

InvoiceSavedItem.title: Invoice Saved Item
InvoiceSavedItem.description: Standard service or product catalog items for recurring use in invoices.

/students/{studentId}.description: Stores all data for a single student.

/notification_templates/{templateId}.description: Stores WhatsApp message templates with their unique webhook URLs.
